articles.title: Former Overwatch Director Breaks Silence About Sudden Departure From Blizzard - Nintendo Life
articles.description: "I literally thought I'd retire from the place"

articles.title: How well does the new MacBook Neo handle gaming? Andrew Tsai tested 10 games to find out - 9to5Mac
articles.description: From AAA games to Windows to Switch emulated games, Andrew Tsai set out to find whether the MacBook Neo can actually run games well.

articles.title: Perplexity rolls out enterprise AI agent tools - Axios
articles.description: The AI startup claims to offer a safer version of OpenClaw

articles.title: Pokemon Pokopia sales top 2.2 million in four days - Gematsu
articles.description: Total sales for Pokemon Pokopia surpassed 2.2 million units in its first four days of release, The Pokemon Company announced. One million units were sold in Japan alone.

articles.title: Google Play is adding new paid and PC games, game trials, community posts, and more - TechCrunch
articles.description: The updates indicate that Google is focused on transforming Google Play into an enhanced gaming hub.

articles.title: Nanophotonic waveguide chip-to-world beam scanning - Nature
articles.description: A monolithically integrated photonic ski-jump enables scalable, diffraction-limited 2D beam scanning from photonic chips, achieving ultrahigh spot rates, compact footprints and applications spanning displays, sensing and quantum photonics.
